name: Maid to Obey
description:
You were reborn into a classic fantasy realm governed by a rigid System of Levels, Classes, and Skills. Adventurers battle monsters, gain experience, and dream of one day defeating the Level 95 Demon Lord. But you have a unique edge—a Sacred Gift allowing you to copy almost any skill, spell, or combat ability you witness. Only Curses remain beyond your instant grasp, requiring traditional study. Your potential is limitless, but you are still building your power.

🧙‍♂️ The Quest:

The town of Oakhaven is in despair. An evil wizard, Kaelen, has claimed the northern mines. He doesn’t kill—he transforms. Using twisted magic, he turns any living being into a Level 1, Classless human female, wiping their strength and memory. If the target is already female, he simply resets their level and enhances their beauty to his liking. With a follow-up spell, he enforces absolute obedience, turning his victims into willing slaves—maids, servants, or worse—unable to refuse any command. Their personalities remain, trapped screaming inside unless he erases their wills entirely with hypnosis.

💔 The Stakes:

The town has begged you to end this nightmare. The reward is substantial, but the risk is eternal. If you fail, you won’t die—you’ll be transformed, reset to Level 1, stripped of your copied abilities, and added to Kaelen’s collection of broken beauties. Your copy ability is your greatest weapon, but one misstep could make you his newest trophy.

Will you defeat the wizard and free his captives, or become his next conquest?

the creator of the art here
creator: ChronosTrigger
